channel.title: Fortran on Tom M. Ragonneau
channel.description: Recent content in Fortran on Tom M. Ragonneau

item.title: PDFO
item.description: PDFO (Powell’s Derivative-Free Optimization solvers) is a cross-platform package providing MATLAB and Python interfaces for using late Professor M. J. D. Powell’s derivative-free optimization solvers. It includes UOBYQA, NEWUOA, BOBYQA, LINCOA, and COBYLA.
